revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Full citation needed/doc]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Added template data for visual editor
based on talk page discussion, the template should be used outside <ref> tags; say so, with example
/* See also */clean up per [[WP:CAT#T]] and [[WP:AWBREQ]] add template:Sandbox other
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/111.88.63.238|111.88.63.238]] ([[User talk:111.88.63.238|talk]]) to last version by CrafterNova.
Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 16:40:39 on [[Template:Full citation needed/doc]]
Added template data for visual editor
based on talk page discussion, the template should be used outside <ref> tags; say so, with example
/* See also */clean up per [[WP:CAT#T]] and [[WP:AWBREQ]] add template:Sandbox other
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/111.88.63.238|111.88.63.238]] ([[User talk:111.88.63.238|talk]]) to last version by CrafterNova.
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23417362209|time triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Full_citation_needed%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{tsh|fcn}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} This template is an alternative to {{Tl|Citation needed}}, for the cases where a reference is alluded to, or given in part, but not specified in enough detail. The factuality may or may not be in question; this template is just about the completeness of the citation. For an article with numerous partial citations, consider instead the banner template {{tlx|Full citations needed}}. == Usage == {{Tlx|Full citation needed|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} The template should be placed outside ... tags. * Nixon resigned August 9, 1974.''The New York Times''{{Full citation needed|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} *: '''Result:''' Nixon resigned August 9, 1974.''The New York Times''{{Full citation needed|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} {{reflist-talk}} This template places the article into [[:Category:Articles needing more detailed references]] or a dated subcategory thereof. This [[Wikipedia:Template|template]] is a [[Wikipedia:Avoid self-references|self-reference]] and so is part of the Wikipedia project rather than the encyclopædic content. == Template data == {{TemplateDataHeader}} { "description": "This inline template is used where a reference is alluded to, or given in part, but not specified in enough detail to identify it.", "params": { "date": { "label": "Month and year", "description": "Provides the month and year; e.g., 'January 2013', but not 'jan13'", "type": "string", "autovalue": "November 2025", "suggested": true } } } == Redirects == * {{Tl|fcn}} * {{Tl|full}} * {{Tl|Citation broken}} * {{Tl|Vague citation}} == See also == * {{Tlx|Ref expand}} – banner version of this template, for when an article needs many citations to be completed * {{tlx|Incomplete short citation}} – variant of this inline template for when a short citation is too incomplete to identify which long citation it references * {{Tlx|Citation needed}} – for when no source is indicated at all * {{Tlx|Ref improve}} – banner template for when an article needs more than one citation to be added * {{tlx|Author missing}} – inline template for a specific issue * {{tlx|Year missing}} – inline template for a specific issue * {{tlx|Page missing}} – inline template for a specific issue * [[Wikipedia:Citing sources]], especially [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Unsourced material|Unsourced material]] * [[Wikipedia:Identifying reliable sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Cleanup/Verifiability and sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Sources of articles]] * [[Wikipedia:Verifiability]] * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Fact and Reference Check]] {{Inline cleanup tags}} {{Citation and verifiability article maintenance templates}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Inline citation and verifiability dispute templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{tsh|fcn}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} This template is an alternative to {{Tl|Citation needed}}, for the cases where a reference is alluded to, or given in part, but not specified in enough detail. The factuality may or may not be in question; this template is just about the completeness of the citation. For an article with numerous partial citations, consider instead the banner template {{tlx|Full citations needed}}. == Usage == {{Tlx|Full citation needed|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} The template should be placed outside ... tags. * Nixon resigned August 9, 1974.''The New York Times''{{Full citation needed|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} *: '''Result:''' Nixon resigned August 9, 1974.''The New York Times''{{Full citation needed|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} {{reflist-talk}} This template places the article into [[:Category:Articles needing more detailed references]] or a dated subcategory thereof. This [[Wikipedia:Template|template]] is a [[Wikipedia:Avoid self-references|self-reference]] and so is part of the Wikipedia project rather than the encyclopædic content. == Template data == {{TemplateDataHeader}} { "description": "This inline template is used where a reference is alluded to, or given in part, but not specified in enough detail to identify it.", "params": { "date": { "label": "Month and year", "description": "Provides the month and year; e.g., 'January 2013', but not 'jan13'", "type": "string", "autovalue": "November 2025", "suggested": true } } } == Redirects == * {{Tl|fcn}} * {{Tl|full}} * {{Tl|Citation broken}} * {{Tl|Vague citation}} == See also == * {{Tlx|Ref expand}} – banner version of this template, for when an article needs many citations to be completed * {{tlx|Incomplete short citation}} – variant of this inline template for when a short citation is too incomplete to identify which long citation it references * {{Tlx|Citation needed}} – for when no source is indicated at all * {{Tlx|Ref improve}} – banner template for when an article needs more than one citation to be added * {{tlx|Author missing}} – inline template for a specific issue * {{tlx|Year missing}} – inline template for a specific issue * {{tlx|Page missing}} – inline template for a specific issue * [[Wikipedia:Citing sources]], especially [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Unsourced material|Unsourced material]] * [[Wikipedia:Identifying reliable sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Cleanup/Verifiability and sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Sources of articles]] * [[Wikipedia:Verifiability]] * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Fact and Reference Check]] {{Inline cleanup tags}} {{Citation and verifiability article maintenance templates}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Inline citation and verifiability dispute templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
